name_cn:
.💖[Full set of original green packaging]💖
Gucci New Arrival Introduction: Immersed in retro sentiment, the Ophidia family welcomes a new member—a medium tote bag. The square shape evokes retro design. The GG high-quality canvas is embellished with red and green webbing, the brand's most distinctive classic elements, paying tribute to the brand's equestrian origins. Ophidia Web
Model: 503876.
Size: 32.5*20*10cm.
Color: Brown/pvc.
